role: CI-time static verification of handler purity and adapter capability declarations; replaces a runtime sandbox with compile-time discipline.

public_api.desc: Frozen dataclass (module, lineno, message) surfaced by all scans.
F16 handler import allow-list scan; accepts extra_allowed set.
F17 pytest fixture; refuses non-frozen pydantic models.
F18 adapter capability scan; declared allowed_io widens core allow-list.

purity_rules.widening_mechanism: extra_allowed set (typically esr.toml allowed_imports) unioned at purity.py:55
purity_rules.type_checking_escape: if TYPE_CHECKING: / if typing.TYPE_CHECKING: subtree skipped entirely (purity.py:62-66, 102-108)
purity_rules.function_body_imports_flagged: Runtime imports inside a def body still violate (test_purity_imports.py:119-131)
purity_rules.submodule_matching: Top-level root matched via split('.',1)[0]; submodules of allowed roots pass, submodules of disallowed roots fail (purity.py:69, 86)
purity_rules.state_is_frozen_pydantic_model: frozen_state_fixture checks model_config['frozen']==True or attribute; raises TypeError if absent (purity.py:125-135)

adapter_capability_rules.author_declaration: Adapter author writes @esr.adapter(allowed_io={'lark_oapi': '*', ...}); scan_adapter receives that dict.
adapter_capability_rules.version_pins_ignored_at_ci: Values of allowed_io dict (e.g. '*' or pin strings) checked only for membership (capability.py:57-61)

rules.enforces: setattr on any field of default-constructed state raises pydantic ValidationError
state.py passes scan_imports with NO extra_allowed (core list only)
on_msg(state, probe-Event) returns (new_state, _) where new_state still raises ValidationError on setattr — confirms model_copy preserves frozen contract

tests.command: cd /home/yaosh/projects/esr/py && uv run pytest tests/test_capability.py tests/test_handlers_cross_cutting.py tests/test_purity_frozen.py tests/test_purity_imports.py -q

design_observations: Two-tier allow-list: tighter for handlers (6 roots) than adapters (24 roots) — handlers are pure, adapters are I/O boundaries.
TYPE_CHECKING subtree skipped (purity.py:62-66) — reviewer S6 escape hatch for forward refs.
Single parametrised file replaces 8 per-handler duplicates (test_handlers_cross_cutting.py:1-8 docstring).
frozen_state_fixture guards against silent mis-config: a non-frozen model would accept mutation and defeat purity (purity.py:131-135).
